quotes: I'm not afraid of dying, I'm afraid of never trying
We're just two lost souls swimming in a fish bowl
And in the end, the love you take is equal to the love you make
I wanna be the very best, like no one ever was
Rape me, rape me my friend, Rape me, rape me again
What I've felt, what I've known, never shined through in what I've shown
I tried so hard and got so far, but in the end it doesn't even matter
Wake me up when September ends
Забери свои слова обратно — мы их выучили наизусть
Мы хотим танцевать, нас не волнует никто
Моё сердце остановилось, твоё имя на губах
This is not a song, it's a suicide note
